LanguageData.SGM.GateDialFailed_IsInUse: Could not activate stargate: target stargate is already active.
LanguageData.SGM.GateDialFailed_NotFound: Could not activate stargate: target stargate could not be found.
LanguageData.SGM.BlockedByLandmark: Stargate sites cannot be created on landmarks.
LanguageData.SGM.Notif.CannotWake: Cannot wake gate: active gate already present in the local area.
LanguageData.SGM.Notif.GateHibernating: Built gate is hibernating: active gate already present in the local area.
LanguageData.SGM.GateHibernating: Address conflict: Gate in hibernation mode.
LanguageData.SGM.RespawnGateString: Please respawn this gate (and its accompanying DHD) using devmode, as an update has broken it.
LanguageData.SGM.WakeHibernationDesc: Make this the active gate in the local area. Only one gate can be active at the same time. \nThe local area includes this map, and any associated sub-maps (pocket maps).
LanguageData.SGM.OpenCloseIrisDesc: Open or close this stargate's iris.
LanguageData.SGM.CreateSGSiteDesc: Create a new stargate site at this location.
LanguageData.SGM.RenameGateSiteDesc: Give this stargate site a more recognisable name.
LanguageData.SGM.TransmitGDODesc: Transmit an identification code through the gate, opening the iris on the other side.
LanguageData.SGM.SelectConnectedGateDesc: Jump to the gate on the other side of the wormhole connection.
LanguageData.SGM.SelectGateConflictDesc: Jump to the gate that's preventing this gate from waking.
LanguageData.SGM.BringThingToGateAction: Bring item or pawn to stargate
LanguageData.SGM.CannotDecodeSGSymbols: Cannot decode: glyph deciphering not researched
LanguageData.SGM.ShortenDialSeq.Label: Shorten gate dial sequence
LanguageData.SGM.ShortenDialSeq.TT: Shorten the time it takes for the gate to dial an address.
LanguageData.SGM.DebugMode.Label: Debug mode
